name: DW · Dim Employee
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS employee_id,
    'EMP-' || lpad(gs::text, 4, '0')                                           AS employee_code,
    (ARRAY['Alice','Bob','Charlie','Diana','Eve','Frank','Grace','Henry'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('EFN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 8)::int]    AS first_name,
    (ARRAY['Smith','Jones','Brown','Garcia','Miller','Davis','Lopez','Wilson'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('ELN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 8)::int]    AS last_name,
    (ARRAY['Sales','Support','Marketing','Finance','Operations'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('EDEPT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)::int]  AS department,
    (ARRAY['Rep','Senior Rep','Lead','Manager','Director'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('EROLE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)::int]  AS role,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('ESTORE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 50)::int      AS store_id,       -- FK -> dim_store (1..50)
    CASE WHEN gs <= 20 THEN NULL                                                                   -- top 20 are unmanaged
         ELSE 1 + (('x'||substr(md5('EMGR'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 20)::int END AS manager_id, -- FK -> dim_employee (1..20)
    CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('EHIRE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2500)::int AS hire_date,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('ESAL'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 120000)::int + 40000)::numeric, 2) AS annual_salary
FROM generate_series(1, 300) AS gs
